clickhouse_host.name: ClickHouse host
clickhouse_host.description: Hostname or IP of the ClickHouse HTTP interface (e.g. your HA host IP).

clickhouse_port.name: ClickHouse port
clickhouse_port.description: ClickHouse HTTP port (8124 when using the published port of the ClickHouse add-on).

clickhouse_database.name: Database
clickhouse_database.description: Target database; created automatically if missing.

clickhouse_table.name: Table
clickhouse_table.description: Target table; created automatically if missing.

batch_size.name: Batch size
batch_size.description: Flush to ClickHouse after this many buffered rows.

flush_interval.name: Flush interval (s)
flush_interval.description: Flush buffered rows at least every N seconds.

include_attributes.name: Include attributes
include_attributes.description: Store entity attributes as a JSON string.
